intro.subhead: Take our scientifically designed personality test to discover your 4-letter type and get a full analysis of your personality profile.
intro.aboutBody: Inspired by the MBTI framework, this 16-type personality test helps you discover how you think, communicate, and make decisions. In just a few minutes, you'll uncover your 4-letter personality type and unlock a full analysis report with insights into your strengths, relationships, and ideal career path.
intro.card1Body: Discover your unique combination across four key personality dimensions.
intro.card2Body: Get detailed breakdowns of your strengths, relationships, and growth areas.
intro.card3Body: Access a personalized growth plan with our brain training platform.
intro.whyBody: Your personality type shapes how you connect with others, approach challenges, grow professionally, and make important decisions. By completing this test, you'll unlock personalized insights that reveal your strengths, areas for improvement, ideal career paths, relationship style, and the unique patterns that define your 4-letter type.
intro.typesBody: Your personality is measured across four dimensions — Energy, Information, Decisions, and Lifestyle. Each dimension has two preferences, and your unique combination creates one of 16 distinct personality types.
intro.howBody: Getting started is simple. Follow these steps to uncover your personality type.
intro.step2Desc: Rate each statement on a 5-point scale from Strongly Agree to Strongly Disagree.
intro.step3Desc: Receive your 4-letter personality type with detailed trait breakdowns.
intro.step4Desc: Discover your strengths, ideal careers, famous examples, and personal insights.
intro.testimonialsBody: Thousands of people have discovered their personality type with us.
intro.t1Quote: This test nailed my personality type. The results helped me understand why I approach problems the way I do — and how to communicate better with my team.
intro.t2Quote: I've taken many personality tests, but this one stood out. The detailed breakdowns and career suggestions were surprisingly accurate and helpful.
intro.t3Quote: Quick, easy, and insightful. I shared my results with my partner and it sparked an amazing conversation about how we complement each other.

faq.q1: What do I get with my purchase?
faq.a1: You'll unlock your complete 4-letter personality type report, including detailed trait insights, strengths and growth areas, relationship style, ideal career matches, and personalized brain training recommendations. Your purchase also includes a 7-day free trial of IQ Booster, with daily exercises that adapt to your progress. After 7 days, your subscription will begin automatically unless canceled before the trial ends.
faq.q2: How can I cancel my subscription?
faq.a2: You can cancel your subscription at any time through your account settings or by contacting our customer support team. There are no cancellation fees.
faq.q3: How can I get support if needed?
faq.a3: Our customer support team is available 24/7 via email and live chat. You can also visit our help center for instant answers to common questions.

aboutUs.title: About Us
aboutUs.p1: At 16Types, we believe that understanding yourself is the first step toward personal growth. Our mission is to make personality discovery simple, insightful, and actionable for everyone.
aboutUs.p2: Inspired by the MBTI framework, our 16-type personality test is designed to help people uncover how they naturally think, communicate, make decisions, and build relationships. In just a few minutes, users can discover their unique 4-letter personality type and unlock a detailed analysis of their strengths, growth areas, career paths, relationship style, and decision-making patterns.
aboutUs.p3: But we go beyond simply revealing a personality type.
aboutUs.p4: Our goal is to transform self-awareness into real-life improvement. That's why we combine deep personality insights with practical recommendations, personalized growth plans, and access to our brain training platform, helping users strengthen focus, confidence, decision-making, and everyday performance over time.
aboutUs.p5: Whether you're exploring your ideal career, improving relationships, understanding your natural habits, or simply learning more about yourself, 16Types is built to guide your journey with clear and meaningful insights.
aboutUs.p6: We're here to help you not only discover who you are, but also unlock who you can become.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find quick answers about your personality report, subscription, brain training trial, and account support.
faq.a1: Our test is inspired by the MBTI framework and the 16 personality types model. By answering questions about how you naturally think, feel, and make decisions, the system identifies your 4-letter type and generates a personalized analysis report.
faq.q2: How long does the test take?
faq.a2: The test includes a series of quick personality questions and usually takes 3–5 minutes to complete.
faq.q3: What do I get with my purchase?
faq.a3: You'll unlock your complete 4-letter personality report, including strengths, growth areas, relationship style, communication patterns, ideal career paths, and personalized recommendations. Your purchase also includes a 7-day free trial of our brain training platform, with daily exercises that adapt to your progress. After 7 days, the subscription begins automatically unless canceled before the trial ends.
faq.q4: Will I get a full report?
faq.a4: Yes. After completing the test, you'll receive a full personality profile report with detailed insights into your strengths, blind spots, relationships, work style, and ideal career path.
faq.q5: Can I cancel the brain training trial anytime?
faq.a5: Yes. You can cancel anytime during the 7-day free trial to avoid automatic subscription renewal.
faq.q6: How can I cancel my subscription?
faq.a6: You can cancel your subscription anytime from your account settings or by contacting our support team before the renewal date.
faq.a7: Yes. Your answers and personal details are kept confidential and are never shared with third parties.
faq.a8: You can reach our support team anytime through our contact page or by email at info@16types.ai, and we'll be happy to assist you.

aboutIQ.title: About IQ Booster
aboutIQ.lead: IQ Booster is a brain training service provided by 16Types to help users enhance their cognitive skills.
aboutIQ.p1: As part of the 16Types experience, users who complete the Personality test are invited to join IQ Booster for a more advanced and tailored brain training experience. IQ Booster is a premium service, and access is available through either a one-time payment or a flexible subscription plan.
aboutIQ.p2: At IQ Booster, we are dedicated to helping you unlock the full potential of your mind. Just like your body, your brain benefits from regular training to stay sharp, agile, and ready for any challenge. Our platform is designed to help you enhance key cognitive skills through engaging, scientifically-backed exercises.
aboutIQ.p3: Whether you want to improve memory, sharpen focus, boost problem-solving abilities, or strengthen your mental agility, IQ Booster provides the tools to help you succeed. With a user-friendly platform and personalized training programs, IQ Booster supports your journey to becoming more confident and effective in every aspect of life.
aboutIQ.p4: IQ Booster provides daily workouts across several important topics. Each workout is designed to help you build and maintain stronger mental performance over time.
aboutIQ.s1Text: Logical Reasoning questions involve using critical thinking skills to assess logical relationships between statements or arguments. You will utilize critical thinking skills to evaluate the logical connections between statements or arguments.
aboutIQ.s2Text: Engage in Number Sequence questions that test your ability to identify and predict patterns in numerical sequences. These tasks may include finding missing numbers, determining the next number in a sequence, and discerning the underlying rule.
aboutIQ.s3Text: Symbolic Language questions entail the use of symbols to depict relationships between objects, concepts, or ideas. Try to identify translation words from multiple columns of different, overlapping symbolic "dictionaries".
aboutIQ.s4Text: General Knowledge questions assess your broad knowledge across a wide range of topics, requiring a comprehensive understanding of information and facts. Test your general knowledge across various subjects, such as history, geography, science, arts, literature, and popular culture.
aboutIQ.s5Text: Visual/Spatial challenges involve the identification of patterns, mental rotation of objects, spatial problem-solving, and the visualization of intricate structures.
aboutIQ.s6Text: With IQ Booster, you can also track your progress across different cognitive areas. The platform shows you exactly where you stand, highlights your strengths and weaknesses, and helps you identify what areas need improvement. This allows you to personalize your training and focus on the skills that matter most to you.
aboutIQ.s7Text: In addition to daily workouts, you can enjoy unlimited brain games that sharpen your memory, improve focus, enhance problem-solving, and boost critical thinking skills — all designed to keep your mind active and growing.
aboutIQ.closing1: You can enjoy IQ Booster anytime, anywhere — from your desktop, tablet, or mobile phone. The service offers a wide variety of fun and challenging brain games, designed to stimulate your mind and help you consistently improve your cognitive abilities.
aboutIQ.closing2: Train smarter, think faster, and achieve more with IQ Booster.

sixteenTypes.subtitle: Your personality is measured across four dimensions — Energy, Information, Decisions, and Lifestyle. Each dimension has two preferences, and your unique combination creates one of 16 distinct personality types.
sixteenTypes.g1Sub: Intuitive (N) and Thinking (T) personality types, known for their rationality, impartiality, and intellectual excellence.
sixteenTypes.g2Sub: Intuitive (N) and Feeling (F) personality types, known for their empathy, diplomatic skills, and passionate idealism.
sixteenTypes.g3Sub: Observant (S) and Judging (J) personality types, known for their practicality and focus on order, security, and stability.
sixteenTypes.g4Sub: Observant (S) and Prospecting (P) personality types, known for their spontaneity, ingenuity, and flexibility.

desc.INTJ: Strategic and analytical, they excel at planning and value independence but may struggle with emotional expression.
desc.INTP: Logical and curious, they enjoy abstract ideas and independent thinking, but may struggle with decisions and seem detached.
desc.ENTJ: Bold, decisive leaders who are efficient, organized, and driven by progress. They thrive on challenges but can seem impatient or critical.
desc.ENTP: Quick-witted and energetic, they thrive on debate and new ideas but can be impulsive and struggle with follow-through.
desc.INFJ: Idealistic and compassionate, they seek meaning and help others but may struggle with boundaries and emotional exhaustion.
desc.INFP: Creative and idealistic, they're guided by inner values and passion, but can be overly sensitive and prone to daydreaming.
desc.ENFJ: Charismatic and supportive, they inspire others and aim to improve the world but may be self-sacrificing and people-pleasing.
desc.ENFP: Enthusiastic and imaginative, they enjoy new ideas and meaningful connections but may struggle with commitment, structure, and focus.
desc.ISTJ: Responsible and practical, they value structure and tradition but may struggle with flexibility and adaptability.
desc.ISFJ: Caring and dependable, they are kind and committed to helping others but may struggle with self-assertion and handling criticism.
desc.ESTJ: Assertive and organized, they value efficiency, structure, and responsibility, but can come across as rigid or overly controlling.
desc.ESFJ: Social and warm, they thrive on connection, harmony, and helping others, but may become overly concerned with others' opinions.
desc.ISTP: Practical and independent, they enjoy hands-on problem-solving and new experiences but can be distant or impulsive.
desc.ISFP: Artistic and sensitive, they're in tune with their emotions and value creativity, but may struggle with planning and confrontation.
desc.ESTP: Energetic and spontaneous, they thrive on excitement and action but may struggle with patience and long-term commitment.
desc.ESFP: Fun-loving and outgoing, they bring energy to every moment and love socializing but may struggle with planning and discipline.

famousPeople.title: Famous People by Personality Type
famousPeople.subtitle: Explore famous people, historical figures, creators, leaders, and innovators often associated with each of the 16 personality types.
famousPeople.noteBody: Personality types for public figures are estimated based on public information and are not verified results. These examples are for illustration only.

body.closingBody: Others see {{type}}s as composed, strategic, independent, and sometimes intimidating. Inside a small, trusted circle, they are warm, loyal, and surprisingly playful. They take their commitments seriously and quietly show up for the few people and projects they truly care about.
